name: pin_alias_node_ref
xml: <system name="t" ir_version="0.1"><nets><net id="a" role="power"/><net id="b" role="ground"/></nets><components><component id="R1" type="resistor"><value>1k</value><pin name="1" node="a"/><pin name="2" ref="b"/></component></components></system>
canonical:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<system ir_version="0.1" name="t">
  <nets>
    <net id="a" role="power"/>
    <net id="b" role="ground"/>
  </nets>
  <components>
    <component id="R1" type="resistor">
      <value>1k</value>
      <pin name="1" node="a"/>
      <pin name="2" ref="b"/>
    </component>
  </components>
</system>

name: net_owned_node
xml: <system name="t" ir_version="0.1"><nets><net id="vcc" role="power"><node component="R1" pin="1"/></net><net id="gnd" role="ground"><node component="R1" pin="2"/></net></nets><components><component id="R1" type="resistor"><value>1k</value></component></components></system>
canonical:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<system ir_version="0.1" name="t">
  <nets>
    <net id="gnd" role="ground">
      <node component="R1" pin="2"/>
    </net>
    <net id="vcc" role="power">
      <node component="R1" pin="1"/>
    </net>
  </nets>
  <components>
    <component id="R1" type="resistor">
      <value>1k</value>
    </component>
  </components>
</system>

name: pins_wrapper
xml: <system name="t" ir_version="0.1"><nets><net id="a" role="power"/><net id="b" role="ground"/></nets><components><component id="R1" type="resistor"><value>1k</value><pins><pin name="1" net="a"/><pin name="2" net="b"/></pins></component></components></system>
canonical:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<system ir_version="0.1" name="t">
  <nets>
    <net id="a" role="power"/>
    <net id="b" role="ground"/>
  </nets>
  <components>
    <component id="R1" type="resistor">
      <value>1k</value>
      <pins>
        <pin name="1" net="a"/>
        <pin name="2" net="b"/>
      </pins>
    </component>
  </components>
</system>

name: part_as_type
xml: <system name="t" ir_version="0.1"><nets><net name="a"/><net name="b"/></nets><components><component name="R1" part="resistor"><value>1k</value><pin name="1" net="a"/><pin name="2" net="b"/></component></components></system>
canonical:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<system ir_version="0.1" name="t">
  <nets>
    <net name="a"/>
    <net name="b"/>
  </nets>
  <components>
    <component name="R1" part="resistor">
      <value>1k</value>
      <pin name="1" net="a"/>
      <pin name="2" net="b"/>
    </component>
  </components>
</system>

name: bjt_infer
xml: <system name="t" ir_version="0.1"><nets><net id="c" role="power"/><net id="b" role="analog_signal"/><net id="e" role="ground"/></nets><components><component id="Q1" type="bjt"><parameter name="type" value="pnp"/><pin name="c" net="c"/><pin name="b" net="b"/><pin name="e" net="e"/></component></components></system>
canonical:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<system ir_version="0.1" name="t">
  <nets>
    <net id="b" role="analog_signal"/>
    <net id="c" role="power"/>
    <net id="e" role="ground"/>
  </nets>
  <components>
    <component id="Q1" type="bjt">
      <parameter name="type" value="pnp"/>
      <pin name="c" net="c"/>
      <pin name="b" net="b"/>
      <pin name="e" net="e"/>
    </component>
  </components>
</system>

name: value_from_params
xml: <system name="t" ir_version="0.1"><nets><net id="a" role="power"/><net id="b" role="ground"/></nets><components><component id="R1" type="resistor"><parameter name="resistance" value="4700"/><pin name="1" net="a"/><pin name="2" net="b"/></component></components></system>
canonical:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<system ir_version="0.1" name="t">
  <nets>
    <net id="a" role="power"/>
    <net id="b" role="ground"/>
  </nets>
  <components>
    <component id="R1" type="resistor">
      <parameter name="resistance" value="4700"/>
      <pin name="1" net="a"/>
      <pin name="2" net="b"/>
    </component>
  </components>
</system>

name: simprofile_norm
xml: <system name="t" ir_version="0.1"><nets><net id="a" role="power"/></nets><analog><subsystem id="sub1"/></analog><tests><test id="t1"><run duration="1ms"/></test></tests><simulation_profiles><simulation_profile id="p1" solver="ngspice"/></simulation_profiles></system>
canonical:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<system ir_version="0.1" name="t">
  <nets>
    <net id="a" role="power"/>
  </nets>
  <analog>
    <subsystem id="sub1"/>
  </analog>
  <tests>
    <test id="t1">
      <run duration="1ms"/>
    </test>
  </tests>
  <simulation_profiles>
    <simulation_profile id="p1" solver="ngspice"/>
  </simulation_profiles>
</system>

name: implied_role
canonical:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<system ir_version="0.1" name="t">
  <nets>
    <net id="gnd"/>
    <net id="mid"/>
    <net id="vcc"/>
  </nets>
</system>
